---
title: "Hearing Aid & Ear Instruments"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Part of the **sensory/protective** group &middot; 1,109 items
:::

Hearing Aid & Ear Instruments. This collection contains a wide range of medical devices used for hearing assistance and ear examination, including hearing aids, ear specula, thermometers and a variety of surgical tools. There are about one thousand one hundred items in this group.

## Sample Products

| Product |
|---------|
| GN ReSound - HI,AGX2 L961-DRW,PRL WHT |
| Phonak - Phonak Audéo V90-312T (velvet black) |
| Signia - Signia PURE C&G 7AX hearing aid / SLH |
| SIGNIA - HA INTUIS M 4.0 GPH |
| Sonic - CV40 MNR T, 2.4G NFM DG DEMO CAPTIVATE 40 |

## Related Categories

**In the sensory/protective group:**

- [Eye Protection & Accessories](eye-protection-accessories.qmd) (400 items)

<button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" onclick="askChat('Hearing Aid & Ear Instruments')">
  Ask about this category
</button>
